Everyday Luxury. Trusted Craft.

A moment worth cherishing

They were made
for you.

Your pearl stud earrings have arrived. We are so honored they found their way to you.

Discover your pearls

Our Story

Born from a love
of the ocean's gifts

Every pearl holds years of quiet patience — a little miracle formed in darkness, emerging as pure luminescence.

Soulé Pearl was founded in Atlanta, Georgia with a single conviction: that genuine beauty shouldn't be complicated. Arthur Soule spent years visiting freshwater pearl farms, learning the difference between pearls harvested with care and those rushed to market.

What we offer is simple — pearls selected by hand for exceptional luster, smooth surface, and that unmistakable soft glow that only nature can produce. No artificial dyes. No shortcuts. Just the real thing, presented beautifully.

Your earrings carry a piece of that journey. We're glad they're yours now.

Pearl Care Guide

Treat them well,
they'll glow forever

Freshwater pearls reward a little thoughtfulness.
Five simple rituals to keep their luster alive for generations.

01
🌸 Last On, First Off

Always put your pearls on after applying perfume, hairspray, or makeup. The alcohols and chemicals in beauty products slowly dull the nacre and weaken the setting. Before washing your hands, showering, or swimming — take them off first.

Protect the nacre
02
🧺 Wipe After Every Wear

A quick wipe with a soft, slightly damp cloth takes 10 seconds and makes all the difference. It removes skin oils and residue that build up and cloud the luster over time. Let them air-dry fully before storing. A clean makeup pad or microfiber cloth works perfectly.

30 seconds of care
03
🌬️ Store in a Soft Pouch

Pearls are organic gems — unlike diamonds, they need a little air circulation to stay vibrant. Keep them in the velvet pouch that came with your earrings, not an airtight bag or sealed box. Store them separately from other jewelry to avoid scratches.

Let them breathe
04
🌡️ Keep Away from Heat & Sun

Prolonged exposure to direct sunlight or heat — a sunny windowsill, a hot car, or a hairdryer nearby — can cause pearls to dry out and their surface to craze or crack. A cool, shaded spot at room temperature is all they need.

Cool & shaded
05
✨ Wear Them Often

This is the most important rule: wear your pearls. The natural moisture from your skin nourishes the nacre, keeping it supple and luminous. A pearl left in a drawer slowly loses its glow. One worn regularly — to dinner, to work, just because — only gets more beautiful with time.

The best care is love

Share Your Experience

Did they make
you smile?

★★★★★

We're a small, family-run jeweler in Atlanta. Your honest review helps other pearl lovers find us — and means more to our team than we can say.
